display.purpose: One screen headline or hero number per screen, at most.

title.purpose: Card headers, sheet titles, list group headers.

body.purpose: Default reading and input text. Cap measured text at 65-75ch.

amount.purpose: Every money value. Always tabular figures (tnum).

shadows.name: e0
shadows.purpose: Default. Surfaces flat, defined by a 1px border.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one loud action on a screen. Solid mint fill, scale-on-press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; background: #1FA871; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 80ms ease-in-out, background 80ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2BC487; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1FA871; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quiet alternative: white surface, mint text, strong stone border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; background: #fff; color: #1FA871; border: 1.5px solid #B0B2AC; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 80ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1FA871; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Soft-red surface with red text for reversible destructive actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { height: 44px; padding: 0 12px; background: #FBEAE9; color: #C5443E; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 80ms ease-in-out; } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Border-first field; focus thickens to a 2px mint border.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 44px; padding: 12px 14px; background: #fff; color: #111613; border: 1px solid #D4D4CE; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; caret-color: #1FA871; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 180ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9AA09E; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border: 2px solid #1FA871; }

components.name: Selected Chip
components.description: Pill chip in selected state: mint fill, white label.
components.css: .ds-chip-selected { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #1FA871; color: #fff; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2px; }

components.name: Default Chip
components.description: Pill chip at rest: muted stone fill, ink label.
components.css: .ds-chip-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; background: #F3F2ED; color: #111613; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Flat surface defined by a 1px hairline border, no shadow at rest.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; padding: 16px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #D4D4CE; border-radius: 16px; } .ds-card-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2px; color: #5A6160; } .ds-card-amount { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.2px; color: #111613; font-feature-settings: 'tnum'; }

components.name: Bottom Sheet
components.description: Top-rounded sheet with a drag handle. Primary surface for capture and pickers.
components.html:
Pilih kategori
Sheet content
components.css: .ds-sheet { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; width: 100%; max-width: 420px; background: #fff; border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(17,22,19,0.12); padding: 8px 16px 20px; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-sheet-handle { width: 40px; height: 4px; border-radius: 999px; background: #D4D4CE; align-self: center; } .ds-sheet-title { margin: 12px 0 16px; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.1px; color: #111613; } .ds-sheet-body { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: #111613; }

components.name: Bottom Tab Bar
components.description: 5-slot primary nav, 64px, with a raised center ochre Scan FAB (the capture hot path). Active tab in mint.
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 64px; background: #fff; border-top: 1px solid #EAEAE4; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(17,22,19,0.04); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: #5A6160; } .ds-tab-ico { font-size: 20px; line-height: 1; } .ds-tab-lbl { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2px; } .ds-tab-active { color: #1FA871; } .ds-scanfab { width: 52px; height: 52px; flex: 0 0 72px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin: 0 10px; background: #E8922F; border: none; border-radius: 999px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(17,22,19,0.08); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 80ms ease-out; } .ds-scanfab:active { transform: scale(0.94); }

narrative.overview: LOIT looks like spring green growing on warm light ground. Vivid mint ink, the color of the wordmark, sits on a near-white cream canvas tinted faintly green, never pure white, never pure black. The feeling is alive and hopeful: money that breathes, not money that weighs. This is a money smart friend, not a bank. Density is calm; logging a transaction is the act users repeat most, so the common case is uncluttered and one-handed. Surfaces are flat and paper-like, drawn by hair-thin borders, not boxed in shadow. Color is restrained on purpose: the mint accent earns attention precisely because it is rare.
keyCharacteristics: Fresh mint brand on warm tinted-cream (light) and desaturated petrol (dark)
Border-first surfaces; shadows soft, low, and reserved
Inter throughout, with tabular figures for every amount
Restrained accent: mint and ochre appear rarely and mean something
Calm density: optimize the capture hot path, push everything else back

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Mint is the only brand color. On any given screen the mint accent covers well under 10% of the surface. Its rarity is what makes a primary button or a selected chip read instantly. Never tint whole panels mint.

rules.name: The No Pure Black/White Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds are tinted cream or petrol; text is green-black #111613. Pure #000 and #fff are forbidden; they look cold, which is the one thing LOIT must never be.

rules.name: The Tabular Money Rule
rules.body: Every numeric money value uses Inter with tnum. Always. A balance that shifts column width as it updates is a bug, not a style choice.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: Inter only. No serif display, no second face. Hierarchy comes from size and weight (600 vs 400), not from mixing fonts.

rules.name: The Border-Before-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Reach for a 1px border first. A shadow is permitted only when an element must visibly lift above the canvas in response to state or stacking (sheet, FAB, modal). Decorative shadows are forbidden.

dos: Do keep mint under ~10% of any screen. One primary action, one selected state.
Do render every money value in Inter with tabular figures (tnum).
Do define surfaces with a 1px border first; reserve shadows for things that truly float.
Do tint neutrals toward the brand hue. Cream #FAFAF7 and ink #111613, not white and black.
Do keep the capture path uncluttered: a few legible numbers, generous spacing, the next tap obvious one-handed.
Do use the 8-color room palette for shared-room identity, one stable hue per room.
donts: Don't ship cold corporate banking: no navy-and-gold, no dense forms, no jargon, no teller-window sterility.
Don't ship crypto or fintech hype: no neon-on-black, no aggressive gradients, no gamified greed, no fake-urgency copy.
Don't build a cluttered spreadsheet dashboard: no walls of tiny numbers, no chart overload.
Don't add a drop shadow to make a flat card feel separate; fix the border.
Don't tint whole panels mint or introduce a second brand color; ochre is an accent, not a co-lead.
Don't mix in a second font family or a serif display.
